title: ajuga ovalifolia
intro: Ajuga ovalifolia, also known as Bugleweed or Oval-leaved Bugle, is a flowering plant species within the Lamiaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as an antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral agent. The health benefits of Ajuga ovalifolia include reducing anxiety and stress, regulating thyroid function, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Ajuga ovalifolia can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used to address issues such as insomnia, hyperthyroidism, and digestive problems.
